zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles於1501年1月14日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries24歲，母親Nichola Home19歲。他於1534年7月18日與Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan在蘇格蘭度福利爾吉德布萊特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年9月26日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles于1501年1月14日出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries24岁，母亲Nichola Home19岁。他于1534年7月18日与Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan在苏格兰度福利爾吉德布萊特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年9月26日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herries,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish, English: locative name from Hérils in Trévières (Calvados). The name in England may have died out before the end of the medieval period, but survived into the modern period in Scotland.
2 English: variant of Herry with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Harris .

variants.name: Herris
meanings: English:  see  Herries  .

variants.name: Herry
meanings: Scots: Herry, to plunder, most properly to plunder birds' nests

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Herries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish, English: locative name from Hérils in Trévières (Calvados). The name in England may have died out before the end of the medieval period, but survived into the modern period in Scotland.
2 English: variant of Herry with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Harris .

variants.name: Herris
meanings: English:  see  Herries  .

variants.name: Herry
meanings: Scots: Herry, to plunder, most properly to plunder birds' nests

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles was born on 14 January 1501, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries, was 24 and his mother, Nichola Home, was 19. He married Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan on 18 July 1534, in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 26 September 1543, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles est né le 14 janvier 1501, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Nichola Home, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan le 18 juillet 1534, à Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1543, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles am 14. Januar 1501 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries 24 und seine Mutter Nichola Home 19. Er hat am 18. Juli 1534 in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. September 1543 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles è nato il il 14 gennaio 1501 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Nichola Home, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan il 18 luglio 1534, nel Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 26 settembre 1543, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terreglesが1501年1月14日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herriesは24歳，母Nichola Homeは19歳であった。1534年7月18日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルククウドブリトでLady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年9月26日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles(이)가 1501년 1월 14일 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichola Home(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1534년 7월 18일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 커kc드브라이트에서 Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 9월 26일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.14 January 1501–26 September 1543: 1501 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 14–1543 оны Есдүгээр сарын 26

pt.14 January 1501–26 September 1543: 14 de janeiro de 1501–26 de setembro de 1543
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles nasceu em 14 de janeiro de 1501, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Nichola Home, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan em 18 de julho de 1534, em Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1543, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles родился 14 января 1501 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Nichola Home, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan 18 июля 1534 г. в местности кирккудбраит, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 26 сентября 1543 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.14 January 1501–26 September 1543: 14 de enero de 1501–26 de septiembre de 1543
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles nació el 14 de enero de 1501, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Andrew Robert Herries 2nd Lord Herries, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Nichola Home, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan el 18 de julio de 1534, en Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1543, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
